name: babybuddy-mcp-server
description: MCP server for the Baby Buddy API - track and manage baby care data including feedings, diaper changes, sleep, tummy time, and more
long_description: MCP server for the Baby Buddy API - track and manage baby care data including feedings, diaper changes, sleep, tummy time, and more

baby_buddy_url.title: Baby Buddy URL
baby_buddy_url.description: The base URL for your Baby Buddy instance (e.g., http://localhost:8000)

baby_buddy_api_key.title: Baby Buddy API Key
baby_buddy_api_key.description: API key from your Baby Buddy user settings
